basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website https://www.b-u.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Bharathiar University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Relaxation up to five years for SC/ST/OBC/women/physically challenged candidates.

qualification.details: Project Associate I: 1st class in M.Sc. Physics

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

Bharathiar University Project Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Bharathiar University Project Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bharathiar University Project Associate – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Bharathiar University Project Associate – I posts is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Associate – I position is a 1st class in M.Sc. Physics. Ensure you meet this criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate – I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate – I post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/women/physically challenged candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – I role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Associate – I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month, along with applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Associate – I position in the Bharathiar University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Bharathiar University recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Project Associate – I posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate – I posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate – I posts will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Bharathiar University located?
faq.answer: Bharathiar University is located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 641046.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Bharathiar University Project Associate – I recruitment is C3/CRTD/164/2026.
